description: Style NoteGear up your little hero for his everyday adventures with this pair of sandals from marvel. Featuring Spider-Man and the Incredible Hulk on its upper, this pair will easily capture his heart. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for an outing in the park.Product DetailsGreen web pattern texturing on the sandal upper with Spider Man and Incredible Hulk appliquesAnkle strap at the backSpider Man grooves at the outsoleMaterial and CareRubberWipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
